item.title: Starting a Farm on Borrowed Money
item.description: Sharing the reality of starting a farm on borrowed money, showing the determination and daily work behind building a life on the land.

media:content.media:title: Starting a Farm on Borrowed Money
media:content.media:description: Sharing the reality of starting a farm on borrowed money, showing the determination and daily work behind building a life on the land.

item.title: Everything Keeps Getting Stuck in the Mud
item.description: Showing the challenge of working through muddy field conditions as equipment keeps getting stuck. A real look at farm life, patience, and persistence.

media:content.media:title: Everything Keeps Getting Stuck in the Mud
media:content.media:description: Showing the challenge of working through muddy field conditions as equipment keeps getting stuck. A real look at farm life, patience, and persistence.

item.title: Getting This Right Matters on the Farm
item.description: A busy farm moment where getting the job done right sets the tone for the whole year. Practical, focused, and part of daily life at Laura Farms.

media:content.media:title: Getting This Right Matters on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A busy farm moment where getting the job done right sets the tone for the whole year. Practical, focused, and part of daily life at Laura Farms.

item.title: New Gear Box, New Farm Momentum
item.description: Swaping out the old gear box and gets the machine ready for the next job. A simple, hands-on update from life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: New Gear Box, New Farm Momentum
media:content.media:description: Swaping out the old gear box and gets the machine ready for the next job. A simple, hands-on update from life on the farm.

item.title: World's Biggest Combine at Work
item.description: Sharing a look at the world's biggest combine doing its job in the field. A straightforward farm moment with big machinery and harvest energy.

media:content.media:title: World's Biggest Combine at Work
media:content.media:description: Sharing a look at the world's biggest combine doing its job in the field. A straightforward farm moment with big machinery and harvest energy.

item.title: New Tools Make Farm Work Easier
item.description: Sharing new tools that are making daily farm work easier and more efficient.

media:content.media:title: New Tools Make Farm Work Easier
media:content.media:description: Sharing new tools that are making daily farm work easier and more efficient.

item.title: Why the Tractor Wouldn’t Start
item.description: Checking out a tractor that wouldn’t start and finds the reason behind it. A simple farm fix and a good reminder that every day brings a new lesson.

media:content.media:title: Why the Tractor Wouldn’t Start
media:content.media:description: Checking out a tractor that wouldn’t start and finds the reason behind it. A simple farm fix and a good reminder that every day brings a new lesson.

item.title: The Mini Tractor Faces Big Expectations
item.description: A mini tractor takes on big expectations on the farm. A simple look at what it can do and how it fits into daily work.

media:content.media:title: The Mini Tractor Faces Big Expectations
media:content.media:description: A mini tractor takes on big expectations on the farm. A simple look at what it can do and how it fits into daily work.

item.title: John Deere Tractor Floats in the Field
item.description: A surprising look at a John Deere tractor in action, showing how farm machinery can handle tough field conditions.

media:content.media:title: John Deere Tractor Floats in the Field
media:content.media:description: A surprising look at a John Deere tractor in action, showing how farm machinery can handle tough field conditions.

item.title: Driving The John Deere 9630
item.description: A look at the massive John Deere 9630 and what it takes to handle a rig this size on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Driving The John Deere 9630
media:content.media:description: A look at the massive John Deere 9630 and what it takes to handle a rig this size on the farm.

item.title: 24 Tractors in 24 Hours
item.description: Taking on 24 tractors in 24 hours, showing the pace, teamwork, and daily rhythm of farm life.

media:content.media:title: 24 Tractors in 24 Hours
media:content.media:description: Taking on 24 tractors in 24 hours, showing the pace, teamwork, and daily rhythm of farm life.

item.title: Driving the Tractor Without Auto Steer
item.description: Showing tractor driving without auto steer, highlighting skill, focus, and everyday farm work in a simple, hands-on moment.

media:content.media:title: Driving the Tractor Without Auto Steer
media:content.media:description: Showing tractor driving without auto steer, highlighting skill, focus, and everyday farm work in a simple, hands-on moment.

item.title: Using Our New 8RX 370 and Grain Cart
item.description: Putting the new 8RX 370 John Deere and Elmer's Haul Master grain cart to work for the first time.

media:content.media:title: Using Our New 8RX 370 and Grain Cart
media:content.media:description: Putting the new 8RX 370 John Deere and Elmer's Haul Master grain cart to work for the first time.

item.title: Our New John Deere 8RX 370
item.description: Sharing the new John Deere 8RX 370, a fresh addition to the farm and a look at the machinery that keeps daily work moving.

media:content.media:title: Our New John Deere 8RX 370
media:content.media:description: Sharing the new John Deere 8RX 370, a fresh addition to the farm and a look at the machinery that keeps daily work moving.
